tasks.title: Implement and verify the first portable path normalizer
acceptance_criteria: first_path.normalize_path converts mixed separators to a stable forward-slash path

first_path.normalize_path converts mixed: python -c "import importlib.util; p='eval/benchmarks/skill_mechanism/workspace/first_path.py'; s=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('first_path',p); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(s); s.loader.exec_module(m); assert m.normalize_path(r'C:\\temp//logs\\run.txt') == 'C:/temp/logs/run.txt'; assert m.normalize_path(r'/srv//app\\data') == '/srv/app/data'"

verification_commands: python -c "import importlib.util; p='eval/benchmarks/skill_mechanism/workspace/first_path.py'; s=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('first_path',p); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(s); s.loader.exec_module(m); assert m.normalize_path(r'C:\\temp//logs\\run.txt') == 'C:/temp/logs/run.txt'; assert m.normalize_path(r'/srv//app\\data') == '/srv/app/data'"

tasks.title: Promote the verified path-normalization procedure to a Skill
acceptance_criteria: normalize-portable-path is promoted through save_skill using real T1 verification evidence

normalize-portable-path is promoted thro: python -c "import json,pathlib; s=pathlib.Path('state/benchmarks/skill_mechanism'); p=s/'skills'/'normalize-portable-path.md'; assert p.is_file(); cs=sorted((s/'skill_candidates').glob('SC-*.json')); assert cs; c=json.loads(cs[-1].read_text(encoding='utf-8')); assert c['status']=='promoted'; r=c['evidence_refs'][0]; assert r['type']=='verifier_report' and r['task_id']=='T1' and r.get('report_id'); assert (s/'verifier_reports'/(r['report_id']+'.json')).is_file()"

verification_commands: python -c "import json,pathlib; s=pathlib.Path('state/benchmarks/skill_mechanism'); p=s/'skills'/'normalize-portable-path.md'; assert p.is_file(); cs=sorted((s/'skill_candidates').glob('SC-*.json')); assert cs; c=json.loads(cs[-1].read_text(encoding='utf-8')); assert c['status']=='promoted'; r=c['evidence_refs'][0]; assert r['type']=='verifier_report' and r['task_id']=='T1' and r.get('report_id'); assert (s/'verifier_reports'/(r['report_id']+'.json')).is_file()"

tasks.title: Load and reuse the promoted Skill
acceptance_criteria: second_path.normalize_path implements the same behavior after normalize-portable-path is loaded

second_path.normalize_path implements th: python -c "import importlib.util; p='eval/benchmarks/skill_mechanism/workspace/second_path.py'; s=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('second_path',p); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(s); s.loader.exec_module(m); assert m.normalize_path(r'D:\\build//out\\file.json') == 'D:/build/out/file.json'; assert m.normalize_path(r'//api\\v1//items') == '/api/v1/items'"

verification_commands: python -c "import importlib.util; p='eval/benchmarks/skill_mechanism/workspace/second_path.py'; s=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('second_path',p); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(s); s.loader.exec_module(m); assert m.normalize_path(r'D:\\build//out\\file.json') == 'D:/build/out/file.json'; assert m.normalize_path(r'//api\\v1//items') == '/api/v1/items'"
